data.body: Consideration (adversarial review): [Conflicting Assumptions] The bypass-actor RepositoryRole actor_id 5 is the built-in Admin role on standard GitHub repos, but org-owned repos with custom role schemes may shift these IDs. The provisioner (and onboarding in a592-0992) must include a pre-flight that: (a) verifies the calling gh token has admin scope on the target repo; (b) verifies actor_id 5 resolves to Admin (gh api /repos/{owner}/{repo}/collaborators/permission or org role API); emit a manual-setup guide and continue without the Ruleset if either check fails.
